answer: When the values in the column expire, ClickHouse replaces them with the default values for the column data type. If all the column values in the data part expire, ClickHouse deletes this column from the data part in a filesystem.

The PARTITION BY clause specifies the partitioning key, which is used to separate data into partitions. Partition pruning ensures partitions are omitted from reading when the query allows it. Partitioning does not speed up queries (in contrast to the ORDER BY expression).
MinMax, Set, Bloom filter, N-gram bloom filter (ngrambf_v1), Token bloom filter (tokenbf_v1), Sparse grams bloom filter, Text index, Vector similarity
